'''Hedda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], she was stationed at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Ossus Academy]]. Having just been [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|knighted]], Hedda was ordered to protect the [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]] at the Academy when the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] attempted to "secure" it, holding the students hostage. Hedda was in a dormitory when GAG [[Major/Legends|major]] [[Salle Serpa]] moved against the Jedi and was [[Coma gas|coma-gassed]] and shot to death in her dormitory by GAG forces.
